title: tragacantha schelichowii
intro: Tragacantha schelichowii, also known as Russian thistle or Salsola schelichowii, is a plant species native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high concentration of saponins. The health benefits of Tragacantha schelichowii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, diarrhea, and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha schelichowii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat gastrointestinal issues and other health conditions.
